card.name: Phoenix of Suns
card.text: Flying, haste {5}{R}: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each spell you've cast this turn.

card.name: Blood Phoenix
card.text: You may cast this creature from your sanctum (It can't start there.) Flying, haste This creature can't block. When this creature dies, sanctify it. (Put it into its owner's sanctum.)

card.name: Transcendent Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste {U}{R}: Liberate this card from your graveyard. (Exile it if it isn't a Dragon. If it's exiled, its controller creates a colorless 3/2 Dragon creature token with its abilities.)

card.name: Augmented Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste When this creature enters, return target Phoenix permanent card with mana value less than or equal to this creature's power from your graveyard to the battlefield. Iterate (When this enters, conjure a colorless {6} 4/4 artifact creature version of it without iterate into your hand.)

card.name: Augmented Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste When this creature enters, return target Phoenix permanent card with mana value less than or equal to this creature's power from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Rising Phoenix
card.text: Flying, trample, haste When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped and transformed under its owner's control. --- (Back): Verdant Cliffside

card.name: Verdant Cliffside
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Exploring — {7}{R}{G}, {T}: Untap this land and transform it. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each differently named land you control. --- (Front): Rising Phoenix

card.name: Brilliant Phoenix
card.text: Luminous (For each color, if you control four or more permanents of that color, illuminate that color for the rest of the game.) Flying, haste When this creature dies, if you've illuminated red, return it to the battlefield tapped with a finality counter on it.

card.name: Magma Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste You may cast this enchantment from your graveyard by sacrificing an untapped enchantment in addition to its other costs. It enters with a finality counter. Materialize 2 (Tap one or more other enchantments you control with total mana value 2 or more: This also becomes an Icon creature until your next turn.)

card.name: Popular Phoenix
card.text: Flying {2}{R}, Embrace this card from your graveyard: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains flying and haste until end of turn. (Exile it. You may play it on a later turn that a Phoenix or Citizen you control dealt damage to an opponent.)

card.name: Unchained Phoenix
card.text: Bisapience {3}{R} (Cast either half of this card. Pay bisapience once each turn as a sorcery to transform for that turn.) Flying, haste Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, it deals 1 damage to you. --- (Back): Warden of the Peaks

card.name: Warden of the Peaks
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, attacks, or transforms into Warden of the Peaks, exile the top X cards of your library, where X is the amount of life you've lost this turn. You may play them until the end of your next turn. --- (Front): Unchained Phoenix

card.name: Military Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste This creature can't block. When this creature dies, create a token that's a copy of it in your reserves. ({3}: Put up to three tokens from your reserves onto the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Regal Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste Forsake: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. (To forsake, sacrifice creatures with total toughness 3 or more.)

card.name: Adventuruous Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste This creature attacks each combat if able. When this creature dies, if it has toughness less than the number of lands in your realm, return it to the battlefield with a +1/+1 counter on it. (Your realm consists of up to one land of each of the basic land types.)

card.name: Divine Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever this creature attacks, induct. (Create a 0/1 Cleric creature token with "As a sorcery, sacrifice two other Clerics: Transform into a 4/4 God Horror that can't block.") You may cast this card from your graveyard by sacrificing a God in addition to its other costs.

card.name: Prophetic Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste Foretell {2}{R}. You may foretell this card from your graveyard. (During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile this card from your hand face down. Play it on a later turn for its foretell cost.)

card.name: Marred Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever this creature attacks, you get a Scar. (They're boons with "When a creature you control dies, you may pay {1}. If you do, draw a card.") Whenever a boon you own triggers, you may pay {1}{R}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Pathborn Phoenix
card.text: Pathbound {1}{R}. Activate only if a creature you control with flying dealt combat damage to an opponent this turn. ({1}{R}, Reveal this card from your sanctum as a sorcery: Put this card on top of your library.) Flying, haste When this creature enters, create a token that's a copy of target Phoenix card in your graveyard with mana value 3 or less.

card.name: Interstellar Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste {1}, Pay {VB}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Adept Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste When this creature enters, if it was cast, trace its skill into your hand. (Create that card. Traces are cards that become copies when they enter public zones.) [b]Rise From Ashes[/b] {1}{R}{R} | Skill Sorcery Return target card named Adept Phoenix from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Rise From Ashes
card.text: Return target card named Adept Phoenix from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Wish For Flame
card.text: Emerge {4}{R} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.) Flying, haste When this creature dies, if it emerged from a creature, return it to the battlefield.

card.name: Firebird Caller
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, pursue Phoenix. This creature deals 2 damage to you. (To pursue Phoenix, reveal a basic land or Phoenix card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.)

card.name: Twice-Called Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste This creature gets +1/+0 for each creature you control. Reflect {2}{R}. You may activate this creature's Reflect ability from your graveyard. ({2}{R}: Create a token copy of this creature, except it's a 1/1 Wonder Phoenix without reflect. Reflect only as a sorcery, and only once.)

card.name: Moondancer Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste When this creature enters, if you cast it, [b][create a token that's a copy of this creature.] [/b]Impetus {1}{I}{R} (You may cast this from your graveyard as a sorcery with only the text in square brackets for its impetus cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Phoenix of Folly
card.text: Flying, haste When this creature enters, conjure a card named Phoenix of Folly into your graveyard. Retopology {1}{R}{R}. This costs {R} more for each card you own named Phoenix of Folly in exile. (Cast a copy of this from your graveyard by exiling it and paying its retopology cost. Spend only mana from differently named sources this way.)

card.name: Unbroken Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste Unrelenting (When this creature dies, if it wasn't a token, you may discard a card to create a token that's a copy of it with haste.)

card.name: Reflected Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste {5}{R}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a token that's a copy of this card, then you may mirror. (Create a token that's a copy of a token you control.)

card.name: Emsen, Dream Phoenix
card.text: (Creatures don't lose loyalty from damage.) Flying [+1]: Draw a card, then discard a card. [-1]: Create a token that's a copy of target Phoenix card in your graveyard with mana value 3 or less, except it isn't legendary.

card.name: Nebula Phoenix
card.text: Bake (When this enters, up to one target permanent gains its abilities until end of turn.) Flying, haste When this creature dies, if it isn't a token, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Shattered Phoenix
card.text: Flying, deathtouch, haste Fracture — {BR}: Regenerate this creature. Activate only if you've cast a noncreature spell this turn. (The next time this creature would be destroyed this turn, it isn't. Instead tap it.)

card.name: Blossoming Phoenix
card.text: Bloom (Whenever you cast a spell that targets this permanent, you may pay that spell's mana cost. If you do, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.) Flying, haste Whenever you cast a spell that targets, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Architect of Blood Suns
card.text: Colorless spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a colorless spell, surveil 1. Then if you have six or more nonland colorless cards in your graveyard, exile this creature and each colored creature your opponents control.

card.name: Roaming Enchanter
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Once each turn, when you cast a noncreature spell, you may surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)
